title: The Significant Role of Metadata in a Data Warehouse
description: A flowchart illustrating how metadata acts as a central directory and guide for data users, processes, and storage within a data warehouse ecosystem.
relationships: The End User queries the Metadata Repository to understand data meaning and location
The ETL Process reads from and writes to the Metadata Repository to log transformations and lineage
The Data Warehouse Storage structure is documented within the Metadata Repository
